hooks.command: PAYLOAD=$(cat); echo "$PAYLOAD" > ~/.claude/notif-probe.json; MSG=$(echo "$PAYLOAD" | jq -r '.message // .notification // .title // "Needs input"' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Needs input'); DIR=$(basename "$PWD"); if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then TARGET=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}:#{window_index}'); terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message "$DIR — $MSG" -execute "tmux switch-client -t '$TARGET'" -sound default 2>/dev/null; else terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message "$DIR — $MSG" -sound default 2>/dev/null; fi
